checks.expected: complete ready_for_data_contract package with matching SHA-256 outputs
checks.message: Every defense stage must preserve its independently verified bytes.

checks.message: Every defense stage must preserve its independently verified bytes.

checks.message: Every defense stage must preserve its independently verified bytes.

checks.expected: complete review_ready package with matching SHA-256 outputs
checks.message: Every defense stage must preserve its independently verified bytes.

checks.expected: six ordered stages with one project, route, IDs and upstream hash chain
checks.message: A collection of individually valid packages is insufficient without continuity.

checks.expected: review-bound timing, challenge, live-rerun, blocker and rubric contract
checks.message: Defense rules must be fixed before presentation and scoring are observed.

checks.expected: submission IDs and reviewed manifest match defense spec
checks.message: Defense evidence cannot be moved between project or review versions.

checks.expected: accountable presenter and independent disclosed evaluator
checks.message: A polished self-assessment is not an independent defense result.

checks.expected: exact source brief for the reviewed project
checks.message: The final package must include the approved brief, not reconstruct it from state.

checks.expected: eight required sections in ten minutes or less
checks.message: Defense time is reserved for decision reasoning, evidence and limitations.

checks.expected: unique claims with exact stage evidence, type and limitation
checks.message: Presentation language cannot exceed the reviewed claim boundary.

checks.expected: three or more challenge classes with evidence, boundary and next check
checks.message: A defensible unknown names what is unknown and how to test it.

checks.expected: review_ready package, zero open findings and exact reviewed manifest hash
checks.message: Defense cannot silently move from the package approved in re-review.

checks.expected: documented check mode plus byte-identical live implementation rerun
checks.message: A screenshot cannot replace an executable check and observable rerun.

checks.expected: aggregate or synthetic public sample with no raw source, PII or secrets
checks.message: Portfolio publication cannot widen upstream data rights.

checks.expected: all six source stage directories remain byte-identical
checks.message: Defense adds a final package layer without rewriting project history.
